app.name: Kammer
app.tagline: Your communities, gathered in one place.
nav.label: Main navigation
home.title: Home
home.empty.title: All quiet for now
home.empty.body: Posts and events from your communities will show up here.
events.empty.title: No upcoming events
events.empty.body: When one of your communities plans something, you'll find it here.
groups.empty.title: No groups yet
groups.empty.body: The groups you belong to will be listed here.
notifications.empty.title: Nothing new
notifications.empty.body: You're all caught up. New notifications will land here.
you.title: You
you.accounts.title: Your communities
you.accounts.description: You're signed in to these communities. Each one stays on its own server.
you.appearance.title: Appearance
you.language.title: Language
signin.brand.tagline: Your communities, gathered in one place.
signin.instance.title: Add your community
signin.instance.description: Enter the web address of the community you belong to.
signin.instance.label: Community address
signin.instance.error.invalid: That doesn't look like a web address.
signin.instance.error.unreachable: We couldn't find a community at that address. Check it and try again.
signin.email.title: Sign in to {name}
signin.email.description: We'll email you a sign-in link. No password needed.
signin.email.label: Email
signin.email.error: We couldn't send the link. Please try again.
signin.confirm.title: Check your email
signin.confirm.description: We sent a sign-in link to {email}. Open it on this device — or paste it below.
signin.confirm.pasteHint: Paste the link from the email, or just the code at the end of it.
signin.confirm.resent: A new link is on its way.
signin.confirm.error.invalidPaste: That doesn't look like a sign-in link or code.
signin.confirm.error.exchange: That sign-in link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
signin.deeplink.title: Signing you in…
signin.deeplink.error.title: That link didn't work
signin.deeplink.error.body: The sign-in link is invalid or has expired.
